title: Mwanza Urban Water and Sewerage Charges Order, 2003
title_en: Mwanza Urban Water and Sewerage Charges Order, 2003

provisions.title: Title and commencement
provisions.content: This Order may be cited as the Mwanza Urban Water and Sewer­age Charges Order, 2003 and shall be deemed to have come into operation on the 1 st day of January, 2003.

provisions.title: Charges for services
provisions.content: The charges in respect of the services supplied in metered rates, flat rates, sewerage, service charges for Services charges, meter rents, connection charges and reconnection charges, specified in the Schedule to this Order, shall be as specified opposite to the type of service to be provided. Schedule A. Water metered rates S/No. Category New rate w. e. f. 01/01/2003 TShs./m3 1. Domestic 250.00 2. Institution 250.00 3. Commercial 450.00 4. Industrial 500.00 B. Water flat rates per connection/month: 1. Domestic minimum for all areas TShs. 6,000.00 the rest TShs. 250.00/m 3 of estimated consumption. 2. Commercial for all areas TShs. 450.00/m 3 of estimated consumption 3. Industrial for all areas TShs. 500.00/m 3 of estimated consumption C. Sewerage charge is 50% of the water consumption charge/month D. Service charge per connection/month: S/No. Size of connection Service charges 1. 1 / 2 " TShs. 1,200.00 T 3 / 4 " TShs. 1,400.00 3. 1" TShs. 2,200,00 4. 1 1 / 4 " TShs. 3,000.00 5. 1 1 / 2 " TShs. 4,700.00 6. 2" TShs. 6,200.00 7. 3" TShs. 8,000.00 8. 4" TShs. 10,000.00 9. 6" TShs. 15,000.00 10. 8" TShs. 20,000.00 E Meter rents: S/No. Meter rent per month 1. 1 / 2 " Diameter TShs. 500.00 2. 3 / 5 " Diameter TShs. 800.00 3. 1" Diameter TShs. 1,000.00 4. 1 1 / 4 " Diameter TShs. 1,200.00 5. 1 1 / 2 " Diameter TShs. 1,500.00 6 2" Diameter TShs. 2,000.00 7. 3" Diameter TShs. 4,000.00 8. 4" Diameter TShs. 5,000.00 9. 6" Diameter TShs. 10,000.00 10. 8" Diameter TShs. 15.000,00 F. Connection charges: 1. Domestic TShs. 20,000.00 2. Institution TShs. 60,000.00 3. Commercial TShs. 60,000.00 4. Industrial TShs. 100,000.00 5. Sewerage TShs. 50,000.00 G. Reconnection charges: 1. Domestic TShs. 7,500.00 2. Institution TShs. 12,000.00 3. Commercial TShs. 15,000.00 4.
